versionNote: v2 re-freezes the two baseline arms to the models actually available to run the study. The original v1 pinned OpenAI o3-deep-research and Anthropic claude-opus-4-20250514, neither runnable in this environment. v2 runs BOTH baseline arms through the Claude Code environment that FLF names as the benchmark ('a smart person using off-the-shelf deep research / top-of-range Claude Code'), model claude-opus-4-8: the deep-research arm via the Claude Code deep-research skill with web search, and the careful arm via a Claude Code tool-use investigation. This makes the comparison against the literal baseline the judges use. The Epistemic Git arm runs gpt-oss-120b via an OpenAI-compatible provider (default Cerebras). Per the study's own rule, this is a new frozen version, not an edit of v1.

systems.provider: Anthropic (Claude Code deep-research skill, this environment)
Anthropic (Claude Code tool-use investigation, this environment)

configuration.interface: API tool-use loop emulating a careful Claude Code investigation

configuration.cachePolicy: content-hash cache permitted only when model and prompt hashes match

blinding.packetRule: Evaluator packets contain only opaque artifact IDs, task text, and normalized artifacts. Private mappings and run metadata must never be given to evaluators.
